Title / Official Name: RadGraph: Extracting Clinical Entities and Relations from Radiology Reports
Domain: Radiology / Chest X-ray radiology reports / Medical imaging
Clinical Setting: Intensive Care Unit (ICU) and general inpatient hospital settings
Number of Documents / Notes:
Development dataset: 500 MIMIC-CXR reports (425 train, 75 dev), 14,579 entities, 10,889 relations

Test dataset: 100 reports (50 MIMIC-CXR, 50 CheXpert), Average 2,766 entities and 2,009 relations per annotator

Inference dataset: 220,763 MIMIC-CXR reports (6,161,934 entities, 4,409,026 relations)
500 CheXpert reports (13,783 entities, 9,908 relations)
Annotation Types / Levels / Tasks:
NER: 4 entity types
Relation Extraction: 3 relation types (directed edges between entities)
End-to-end entity and relation extraction: Joint task requiring correct entity boundaries, entity types, and relation types
Access / Use Conditions: Free but requires PhysioNet credentialing and Data Use Agreement (DUA)
License / Terms of Use:
PhysioNet Credentialed Health Data License 1.5.0
Ethics / IRB / Privacy Protections:
